headline: School IB economics: Tariffs are a weaker weapon than Trump thinks
body_text:
This article picked by a teacher with suggested questions is part of the Financial Times free schools access programme. Details/registration here.

Specification:

Read the article and then answer the questions:

Tariffs are a weaker weapon than Trump thinks

Questions

One of India’s biggest exports to the US is packaged medicines. Using a tariff diagram, explain the impact of a 50 per cent tariff imposed by the US government on India’s exports to the US would have on:

Alex Smith, Sevenoaks School, InThinking/thinkIB
